content_body: We came to your cabin to celebrate my 26th birthday. Coming from Atlanta, Aska was a refreshing change for the weekend. We had an amzing time just relaxing in the cabin and exploring downtown Blue Ridge. The owner, Gary, was very accommodating and helpful with the questions we had about the wi-fi. The cabin itself was very well maintained and had many nice features to offer. Overall, we all really enjoyed our stay and I will make sure to share our experiences with others so they can come enjoy your beautiful home. Thank you!
title: Really Enjoyed Our Stay!
